overview: Processes EPUB (Electronic Publication) documents. The filter handles encoding detection automatically, supporting Unicode Byte-Order-Mark detection and configurable default encoding fallback.
processingNotes: If the file has a Unicode BOM, the corresponding encoding (UTF-8, UTF-16, etc.) is used automatically, overriding any default encoding setting.
If no BOM is detected, the default encoding specified in the filter options is used.
For UTF-8 output: a BOM is written only if the input was also UTF-8 **and** a BOM was detected in the input. If the input was a different encoding, no BOM is written to the output.
